data.name: v3.0.16
data.body:
## What's Changed
* Remove vestigial broad_utils module by @dpark01 in https://github.com/broadinstitute/viral-ngs/pull/1083
* container-scan.yml: expand Trivy JSON output + repair auto-fix PR machinery by @dpark01 in https://github.com/broadinstitute/viral-ngs/pull/1084
* fix: prevent cve-autofix pipeline from leaking GCP credential files by @dpark01 in https://github.com/broadinstitute/viral-ngs/pull/1087
* ci(container-scan): install gitleaks before cve-autofix secret scan by @dpark01 in https://github.com/broadinstitute/viral-ngs/pull/1088
* ci(container-scan): make gitleaks install-only (run: false) by @dpark01 in https://github.com/broadinstitute/viral-ngs/pull/1089
* Auto-fix: address open CVE issues (2026-06-10) by @viral-ngs-autofix[bot] in https://github.com/broadinstitute/viral-ngs/pull/1090

## New Contributors
* @viral-ngs-autofix[bot] made their first contribution in https://github.com/broadinstitute/viral-ngs/pull/1090

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/broadinstitute/viral-ngs/compare/v3.0.15...v3.0.16
